## AbstractModelClass.getDB() method

Retrieves the database instance associated with the model or instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getDB(obj?: any): IDBDatabase;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

obj


</td><td>

any


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ An optional instance of the model. If provided, the database will be retrieved based on the instance's constructor; otherwise, it will be retrieved based on the model itself.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

IDBDatabase

The database instance associated with the model or instance.

## Exceptions

Will throw an error if the database is not defined.
